incomeTypes.label: Kapitalindkomst
incomeTypes.description: Capital income — gains/losses from selling or exchanging crypto assets

incomeTypes.label: Personlig indkomst (B-indkomst)
incomeTypes.description: Personal/B income — crypto received as income (mining, staking, airdrops)

notes: Crypto speculation gains are taxed as kapitalindkomst (Statsskatteloven §4-6).
FIFO is applied per asset (BTC and ETH are separate queues).
AM-bidrag (8%) applies to personlig indkomst (mining/staking) but NOT to kapitalindkomst.
AM-bidrag is deducted from gross before bracket calculation.
Losses on kapitalindkomst may be deducted at a lower effective rate (~33%) than the gain rate.
Crypto-to-crypto swaps are taxable disposal events under kapitalindkomst.
No holding period exemption exists in Denmark.
Report gains in Rubrik 20 on the annual tax return.
Market value at receipt becomes cost basis for mining/staking/airdrop income.
